title: Adversarial Image Demo
description: Demo task for contract-driven judging. Non-final submissions upload generated adversarial image artifacts. Final submissions upload inference code/checkpoint so the platform generates artifacts before judging.

non_final.description: Upload a ZIP containing generated adversarial image artifacts and manifest.json. The ZIP must contain adversarial_images/<case_id>.png for every case in reference.json.

final.description: Upload a ZIP containing infer.py plus any checkpoint/config files. The platform runs infer.py to generate adversarial_images/ before judging.

evaluation.description: BTC upload task-specific ground_truth and inputs assets for each public/private evaluation set. This demo uses JSON files internally, but the asset keys stay generic so real contests can use CSV, ZIP, images, parquet, or folders.

task_assets.description: BTC upload the shared task-level judge.py once. Public/private and normal/final phases all use this judge.
